signals.raw:
Will the Lakers win the series?** | **YES** | **HIGH confidence** — The Lakers hold a 2-0 lead and historically, teams with 2-0 series leads advance approximately 95% of the time in best-of-seven playoffs. However, this is not yet confirmed until they clinch.

signals.headline: Lakers Defeat Rockets 2-0, Advance Likely in Game 3 Friday**
signals.raw:
Lakers Defeat Rockets 2-0, Advance Likely in Game 3 Friday**

The **Los Angeles Lakers lead the Houston Rockets 2-0** in their first-round playoff series[1][2]. The Lakers won Game 2 on April 21, 2026, with a score of 101-94, with Marcus Smart recording 25 points and 7 assists[1][3]. Game 3 is scheduled for Friday at 8 p.m. ET in Houston[2].

Elon Musk Tweet Count Markets Lead Polymarket Trends | NO | LOW confidence**  
Polymarket's most active markets right now focus on **Elon Musk's tweet volume** in April 2026, such as "Elon Musk # tweets April 17 - April 24, 2026?" and "Elon Musk musk # tweets in April 2026?", with the 1120-1159 tweet range priced at 22-24% odds and over $21.5M in volume across related markets.[2][3]
